kept.reason: Global-to-local hallucination detection method; relevant for reliability and hallucination reduction for LLM-generated text/code.

kept.reason: Verifies NN control systems with images using cGAN surrogate & composition/unrolling. Relates to formal methods + neuro-symbolic verification.
